stemHtml: An alerting service shall be provided for (1) _____ and aircraft(s) (2) _____. Complete the sentence with correct statements.

options.a: (1) uncontrolled flights; (2) with sick or unwell passengers onboard
options.c: (1) controlled flights; (2) subject to unlawful interference
options.d: (1) controlled flights; (2) with sick or unwell passengers onboard
